description_long: This object is an elongated, oval-shaped item with a smooth, seamless exterior, resembling the form of a rugby ball or large capsule. The surface is uniformly colored and appears to be made of a hard, glossy material, likely plastic or coated polymer. There are faint seam lines visible along the length and at the ends, suggesting it may be a molded or pressed container. The object lacks any visible openings, labels, or detailed markings, giving it a minimalist and sterile appearance. Its size and shape are consistent with a large medicine capsule or a sealed pharmaceutical container. The overall finish is highly polished, reflecting light evenly across its surface.
description: A large, smooth, oval medicine container with a glossy, seamless exterior and faint seam lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, symmetrical oval shape and a faint seam running horizontally.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the rounded tip and intersecting seam lines forming a subtle 'X' pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with the same elongated oval profile and horizontal seam.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, identical to view 1, showing the rounded end and intersecting seams.
